NAVAREA XIX 58/24
 1. CABLE LAYING OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS BY VESSEL ILE D'OUESSANT FROM 05 JUN TO 28 JUL 24. VESSEL WILL OPERATE ALONG THE FOLLOWING ROUTE:

 A. 70-41.35N 023-35.55E
 B. 70-53.57N 023-30.29E
 C. 71-06.2N 023-44.59E
 D. 71-11.28N 023-21.45E
 E. 71-34.31N 021-14.32E

  WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 1 NM.
 2. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 290001 UTC JUL 24.
